title: I just thought of something
wikitext:
[]: I just thought of something.             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Sep 26, 2009 3:37 pm So in another thread, we were discussing humanity in Evaverse, yadda yadda, humans and Angels are the same species, blah blah. So the FAR created Adam and Lilith so the fruits couldn't come together, right? And we can all agree that Kaworu has the Fruit of Life like the other Angels, right? But he's genetically human, which means he can bump the buoy with like...I dunno, Rei or Asuka, your choice. Would the result babby formed with both fruits? Would it be an earth-born FAR (lolMari)? Would it be a GiantNakedFetus (poor Asuka's womb)? Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Sep 26, 2009 3:42 pm Fruits could be the same chromosome and one dominant over the other, such that being a carrier of both genes doesn't mean you actually have both fruits in a functional way.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sat Sep 26, 2009 4:06 pm Sounds almost like the Nephillim, ie. the offspring of the Grigori or Watcher angels and humans described in that one verse of the Book of Genesis where it mentions "giants in the earth"; the apocryphal book of Enoch expands on this quite a bit more. It would be questionable if Kaworu could impregnate Rei, since she's a human clone containing Lilith's soul (or a part of it), and we're not sure if she's capable of reproduction at all (per the line in "Rei's Poem", where she speaks of "a woman who does not bleed"). But if he were to do the deed with Asuka... now that could get interesting. I'm guessing it would be an earth-born FAR of some kind, possibly a Nephillim-like being. It's funny that someone should bring this up, since I'm working on a three-part fanfic epic which touches on these possibilities...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Sep 26, 2009 5:19 pm Considering the weirdness of lillim/angel constitutions and potential ATF magic, who's to say Kaworu couldn't knock up Shinji as well?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Sep 26, 2009 5:31 pm Well, the fanbase certainly seems to have taken a bit of interest in Kaworu's fruits already. ...I'll get my coat.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sat Sep 26, 2009 5:38 pm NemZ wrote: Considering the weirdness of lillim/angel constitutions and potential ATF magic, who's to say Kaworu couldn't knock up Shinji as well?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Sep 26, 2009 7:48 pm NemZ wrote: Fruits could be the same chromosome and one dominant over the other, such that being a carrier of both genes doesn't mean you actually have both fruits in a functional way.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Sep 26, 2009 9:15 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Biology aside, I can just imagine an (un)fortunate miscarriage being caused by Asuka, not knowing he's pregnant yet, slapping him and causing him to fall, or kicking him in the stomach, etc, and then she sees some suspicious crotch-bleeding.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sat Sep 26, 2009 10:38 pm NemZ wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: Biology aside, I can just imagine an (un)fortunate miscarriage being caused by Asuka, not knowing he's pregnant yet, slapping him and causing him to fall, or kicking him in the stomach, etc, and then she sees some suspicious crotch-bleeding.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Sep 27, 2009 2:13 pm NemZ wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: Biology aside, I can just imagine an (un)fortunate miscarriage being caused by Asuka, not knowing he's pregnant yet, slapping him and causing him to fall, or kicking him in the stomach, etc, and then she sees some suspicious crotch-bleeding.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Mon Sep 28, 2009 10:11 pm It has come to my attention that clones are sterile

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Sep 28, 2009 10:33 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: It has come to my attention that clones are sterile

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Mon Sep 28, 2009 10:57 pm wow...a half-human/half-angel offspring would be a major nuisance to SEELE, which I imagine being a possibility

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Sep 28, 2009 11:41 pm GasmaskAvenger wrote: wow...a half-human/half-angel offspring would be a major nuisance to SEELE, which I imagine being a possibility

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 28, 2009 11:46 pm Please make your titles more specific in the future so I don't waste time looking at completely pointless threads thinking they might have some genuine insight into anything.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Sep 29, 2009 12:30 am MatrixRefugee wrote: GasmaskAvenger wrote: wow...a half-human/half-angel offspring would be a major nuisance to SEELE, which I imagine being a possibility

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Tue Sep 29, 2009 2:24 am NAveryW wrote: Please make your titles more specific in the future so I don't waste time looking at completely pointless threads thinking they might have some genuine insight into anything.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Sep 29, 2009 2:08 pm A weird concept would be what would the result of KaworuXRei descendants mixing with normal humans over a few centuries. What if a large part of the human population had latent Angelic properties that can be awakened?

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Sep 29, 2009 2:19 pm AuraTwilight wrote: I doubt it. What they're looking for isn't superior lifeforms, like with actual evolution, that's just a cover. They want completeness, godhood, and freedom from desire and suffering. Only Instrumentality can do this. Making everyone some sort of mini-FAR isn't going to help them because the psychology isn't going to shift much.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 29, 2009 2:38 pm AuraTwilight wrote: *Points to X-Men*
